channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 10 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-23928 - Zabbix
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Zabbix
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Item history widget (in Zabbix 7.0+) or the Plain text widget (in Zabbix 6.0) can execute injected JavaScript when HTML display is enabled. This can allow an attacker to perform unauthorized actions depending on which user opens a dashboard containing these widgets. The malicious JavaScript would have to come from a monitored host controlled by the attacker. Note: the Item history widget is a replacement for the...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23928
 
💣 How Broadcom Is Helping Enterprises Win the AI Security Sprint
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Earlier this month, Broadcom published findings from our frontier model research initiative examining what frontier AI models can do when applied to vulnerability discovery and exploitation. The conclusions were sobering: AI can compress the window between disclosure and active exploit from weeks to hours, at a scale and persistence no human red team can match.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/how-broadcom-is-helping-enterprises-with-the-ai-security-sprint/
 
📢 FDA Advisory No.2026-0357 || Public Health Warning Against the Purchase and Use of the Unregistered Household/Urban Pesticide (HUP) Product “SMOKE INSECT AGENT ELASTIC HERBAL INSECTICIDE COCKROACH MOSQUITO FUMIGANT KILLER R - fda.gov.ph
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Elastic, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 博通發布 VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-taiwan/2026/05/06/%E5%8D%9A%E9%80%9A%E7%99%BC%E5%B8%83-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Palo Alto PAN-OS Flaw Under Active Exploitation Enables Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.3
Resumo:
Palo Alto Networks has released an advisory warning that a critical buffer overflow vulnerability in its PAN-OS software has been exploited in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-0300, has been described as a case of unauthenticated remote code execution. It carries a CVSS score of 9.3 if the User-ID Authentication Portal is configured to enable access from the internet or any
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/palo-alto-pan-os-flaw-under-active.html
 
🚨 Critical Apache HTTP/2 Flaw (CVE-2026-23918) Enables DoS and Potential RCE
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The Apache Software Foundation (ASF) has released security updates to address several security vulnerabilities in the HTTP Server, including a severe vulnerability that could potentially lead to remote code execution (RCE). The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-23918 (CVSS score: 8.8), has been described as a case of "double free and possible RCE" in the HTTP/2 protocol handling.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/critical-apache-http2-flaw-cve-2026.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-43073 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: x86-64: rename misleadingly named '__copy_user_nocache()' function This function was a masterclass in bad naming, for various historical reasons. It's a specialty memory copy routine that uses non-temporal stores for the destination (but not the source), and that does exception handling for both source and destination accesses. Also note that while i...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43073
 
🚨 CVE-2025-71291 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: misc: bcm_vk: Fix possible null-pointer dereferences in bcm_vk_read() In the function bcm_vk_read(), the pointer entry is checked, indicating that it can be NULL. If entry is NULL and rc is set to -EMSGSIZE, the following code may cause null-pointer dereferences: struct vk_msg_blk tmp_msg = entry->to_h_msg[0]; set_msg_id(&tmp_msg, entry->usr_msg_id);...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-71291
 
💣 Palo Alto Networks warns of firewall RCE zero-day exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Palo Alto Networks warned customers today that a critical-severity unpatched vulnerability in the PAN-OS User-ID Authentication Portal is being exploited in attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/palo-alto-networks-warns-of-actively-exploited-firewall-zero-day/
 
💣 China-Linked UAT-8302 Targets Governments Using Shared APT Malware Across Regions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A sophisticated China-nexus advanced persistent threat (APT) group has been attributed to attacks targeting government entities in South America since at least late 2024 and government agencies in southeastern Europe in 2025. The activity is being tracked by Cisco Talos under the moniker UAT-8302, with post-exploitation involving the deployment of custom-made malware families that have been put
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/china-linked-uat-8302-targets.html
 
📰 The EOL Blind Spot in Your CVE Feed: What SCA Tools Miss
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Critical vulnerabilities can exist in open source software your scanners don't check. HeroDevs reveals how EOL software creates blind spots in CVE feeds and SCA tools, and how you can receive a free end-of-life scan for your projects.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-eol-blind-spot-in-your-cve-feed-what-sca-tools-miss/
 
📰 Why ransomware attacks succeed even when backups exist
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Backups don't fail because they're missing, they fail because attackers destroy them first. Acronis explains how ransomware targets backup systems before encryption, leaving no path to recovery.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/why-ransomware-attacks-succeed-even-when-backups-exist/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-32834 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Easy PayPal Events & Tickets plugin for WordPress version 1.3 and earlier contain a hardcoded authentication bypass vulnerability in the QR code scanning functionality that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to bypass hash verification by supplying 'test' as the hash parameter. Attackers can access the vulnerable endpoint via the add_wpeevent_button_qr action to retrieve sensitive order details including PayPal...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32834
 
🚨 USN-8232-1: Django vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Django did not vary cached response headers on cookies when sessions were not modified while SESSION_SAVE_EVERY_REQUEST was enabled. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to steal a user's session. (CVE-2026-35192) Kyle Agronick and Jacob Walls discovered that Django incorrectly handled ASGI requests with missing or understated Content-Length header values. A remote attacker could pos...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8232-1
 
🚨 USN-8230-1: Docker vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that BuildKit, contained within Docker, incorrectly handled file path validation when processing frontend API messages. An attacker could possibly use this issue to write files outside of the intended state directory. (CVE-2026-33747) It was discovered that BuildKit, contained within Docker, incorrectly validated the subdir component of Git URL fragments. An attacker could possibly use this issue to...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8230-1
 
🚨 CVE-2026-34464 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Sandboxie-Plus is an open source sandbox-based isolation software for Windows. In versions 1.17.2 and earlier, NamedPipeServer::OpenHandler copies the server field from NAMED_PIPE_OPEN_REQ into a fixed WCHAR pipename[160] stack buffer using wcscat without verifying null termination. The handler only enforces a minimum packet size, and since the service pipe accepts variable-length messages, a sandboxed caller can fil...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34464
 
💣 Azure AD Security Bypass Exploits Phantom Device Registration and PRT Abuse - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Azure. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNWWhRbmQzRnhrTmNmZHhXYThxb0hDMTJMYjZheWw3Q3hOSHZ3d0JMOHBYUXZKeVpYR18xcFVhaGVOcXFqOUtHLVlGd3RnWDBscTE1TU9EYnpUSlVrYmQzMFVoR2ptbHBkN0Jpb0Fka0RWTS1MQy1IYjFCb1ZWUkFLUUh0YU1nUmNfRllsbDJ6cFRSWDB6N1lvX2hUQWh2RjAx?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 04/05/2026 até 06/05/2026.
